description: This file defines the root navigation structure of a React Native application, including stack navigators, tab navigators, and conditional logic to switch between authentication, onboarding, and main app flows.

methods.name: AuthStackNavigator
methods.description: Defines the authentication stack with Welcome, SignIn, and SignUp screens.

methods.name: AppTabsNavigator
methods.description: Defines the bottom tab navigator with Dashboard, Simulations, and Profile tabs.

methods.name: RootNavigator
methods.description: Main exported component that manages navigation flow based on auth and onboarding status.
